meta.title: Andrea Marchese — Full Stack Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Andrea Marchese, Full Stack developer building products with TypeScript, Next.js, Go and a quiet love for craft. Based in Italy.
meta.keywords: Andrea Marchese, full stack developer, Next.js, TypeScript, Go, Italian developer, portfolio

hero.intro: Crafting durable web products with TypeScript, Next.js and a samurai's discipline.

about.label: About
about.title: Curious by default.
about.body: I'm Andrea — a Full Stack developer who treats software like a craft. I care about the small details: a button that feels right, a query that doesn't slow down at 100k rows, a UI that respects the user's time. Influenced equally by editorial design and by the bushidō — the way of disciplined improvement.

work.label: Selected work
work.title: Things I've shipped.
work.intro: A short, deliberate selection — quality over quantity.

contact.label: Connect
contact.title: Let's build something.
contact.intro: I'm open to interesting roles, freelance work and good conversations about software, design, and the occasional kanji.

footer.made: Designed and built with care in Italy.
footer.colophon: Set in PP Editorial New, Geist Mono, Noto Serif JP. Motion by GSAP and Lenis.
